description_long: This greenhouse features an octagonal structure with a combination of wood and metal framing, supporting large transparent panels that make up the majority of its walls and roof. The roof is faceted and primarily constructed from glass or a similar transparent material, allowing ample sunlight to penetrate the interior. The lower sections of the walls are clad in wood, while the upper sections and roof are framed with metallic elements, giving the structure a modern yet robust appearance. The front side includes a prominent entrance with a recessed doorway, and the windows are designed with geometric, stepped patterns that add visual interest. The interior appears spacious, with enough room for plant cultivation, though no plants are visible through the windows. The overall design is compact and suitable for urban environments, blending functional transparency with contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern octagonal greenhouse with glass-paneled walls and roof, wood cladding, and a metal frame, featuring a geometric entrance and ample natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stepped window design, and a clear view of the glass roof panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood cladding, metal framing, and a horizontal structural element above the window.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large transparent panel, stepped window pattern, and a continuous metal frame around the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the geometric window design, wood and metal materials, and the glass roof structure.
